title: Slime's Gallery
body:
# What's this mod about?
![gallery title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b4837daa0fb2cc5e98829313bbe3c02601d1de.png) 

This mod adds a bunch of new paintings for you to enjoy!! 
Credits to Slime (me) for making all of the paintings.
Also credits to UnfunnyMii for coding the entire project and adding gallery support while I made the Gallery painting item textures!!

**Anyways consider Joining My discord :)**

[https://discord.com/invite/5zMFcStp7d](https://discord.com/invite/5zMFcStp7d)

**Here is a preview of all paintings as of v.1.0, textures have been updated as of 1.0.5+**

![gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2926d089a8898d9ee3976a722ebe9f3cc156890b.png)
